basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 02 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 02 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.details: Resident of the Anganwadi center area. Age between 21 to 35 years. Minimum 12th (+2) pass. Knowledge of Odia language (written and spoken). Willing to cook and serve food and assist Anganwadi workers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
